channel.title: FixTheVuln Blog
channel.description: Expert cybersecurity insights, threat analysis, and IT certification study guides.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Feb 24–Mar 10, 2026
item.description: 5 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 10.0. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: This Week in Threats: Feb 17–Mar 03, 2026
item.description: 11 new CISA KEV vulnerabilities this week. Highest CVSS: 10.0. Review the latest threats added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

item.title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Study Guide: How to Pass the CLF-C02 Exam
item.description: AWS Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) study guide with exam overview, study tips, and free practice resources. Plan your certification journey with FixTheVuln.

item.title: AWS SysOps Administrator Study Guide: Everything You Need to Pass the SOA-C03 Exam
item.description: Complete AWS SysOps Administrator (SOA-C03) study guide with domain breakdown, study timeline, practice resources, and exam tips. Free practice quiz included.
